requirement_topic.en: Restricted / Hazardous Substances — No Horizontal RoHS in Indonesia
requirement_topic.zh: 限用 / 有害物质——印度尼西亚无横向 RoHS
requirement_topic.zht: 限用 / 有害物質——印度尼西亞無橫向 RoHS

summary.en: Indonesia does not have a single horizontal RoHS-style law that restricts a fixed list of hazardous substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE, phthalates) in electrical and electronic equipment as a market-access gate in the way the EU RoHS Directive does. Instead, hazardous-substance control for LED products is addressed indirectly through: (1) the safety requirements embedded in the mandatory SNI for the product (e.g., limits on certain materials within SNI IEC 60598 / lamp standards); (2) general hazardous and toxic materials (Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun, B3) management rules under environmental law administered by the Ministry of Environment; and (3) product-specific or sector regulations that may apply. There is no Indonesia-wide RoHS declaration of conformity equivalent. Manufacturers should therefore not assume a RoHS-style restriction applies uniformly, and should verify any substance limits tied to the specific applicable SNI and to B3 rules.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚没有像欧盟 RoHS 指令那样、以固定有害物质清单（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE、邻苯二甲酸酯）作为电气电子设备市场准入门槛的单一横向 RoHS 式法律。LED 产品的有害物质控制改以间接方式处理：（1）产品强制性 SNI 所含的安全要求（如 SNI IEC 60598 / 灯标准中对某些材料的限制）；（2）环境法下由环境部管理的有害有毒材料（Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun，B3）管理规则；以及（3）可能适用的产品专用或行业法规。不存在印度尼西亚全国统一的 RoHS 式符合性声明对应物。因此制造商不应假定 RoHS 式限制统一适用，而应核实与具体适用 SNI 及 B3 规则相关的任何物质限值。
summary.zht: 印度尼西亞沒有像歐盟 RoHS 指令那樣、以固定有害物質清單（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE、鄰苯二甲酸酯）作為電氣電子設備市場准入門檻的單一橫向 RoHS 式法律。LED 產品的有害物質控制改以間接方式處理：（1）產品強制性 SNI 所含的安全要求（如 SNI IEC 60598 / 燈標準中對某些材料的限制）；（2）環境法下由環境部管理的有害有毒材料（Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun，B3）管理規則；以及（3）可能適用的產品專用或行業法規。不存在印度尼西亞全國統一的 RoHS 式符合性聲明對應物。因此製造商不應假定 RoHS 式限制統一適用，而應核實與具體適用 SNI 及 B3 規則相關的任何物質限值。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS-style statute in Indonesia (as of 2026) — substance control via applicable SNI safety requirements
Government Regulation on management of hazardous and toxic materials (B3) — environmental law (Indonesia)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same thresholds as EU RoHS. China RoHS 2 (Management Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products; SJ/T 11364-2014) requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange/green) on EEE sold in China. China therefore has a defined restricted-substance scheme — unlike Indonesia, which has no single horizontal equivalent.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同。中国 RoHS 2（电子电气产品有害物质限制使用管理办法；SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色/绿色）。因此中国有明确的限用物质制度——与无单一横向对应制度的印度尼西亚不同。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同。中國 RoHS 2（電子電氣產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法；SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色/綠色）。因此中國有明確的限用物質制度——與無單一橫向對應制度的印度尼西亞不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in EEE (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Honest mapping note: the EU RoHS dimension does not translate to a single Indonesian RoHS law. Indonesia has no horizontal RoHS-style restricted-substance statute, so a Chinese manufacturer cannot satisfy an Indonesian RoHS obligation because none exists as such. The practical implications are: (1) any substance limits relevant to LED products come from the applicable SNI safety standard and from B3 hazardous-material rules, not from a RoHS list; (2) China's GB/T 26572 / China RoHS 2 disclosure label has no Indonesian counterpart and is not required for the Indonesian market; (3) manufacturers should still control hazardous substances for environmental and B3 / e-waste reasons (see ledidn-rohs-02 and ledidn-rohs-03) and should verify whether the specific applicable SNI or any sector regulation imposes material limits. Do not assume EU RoHS testing is required or sufficient for Indonesia; verify the actual Indonesian requirements with the LSPro and environmental authority.
gap.zh: 诚实映射说明：欧盟 RoHS 维度不对应单一印度尼西亚 RoHS 法律。印度尼西亚无横向 RoHS 式限用物质法规，故中国制造商无法满足印度尼西亚的 RoHS 义务，因为此类义务本身并不存在。实务影响为：（1）与 LED 产品相关的任何物质限值来自适用 SNI 安全标准及 B3 有害材料规则，而非 RoHS 清单；（2）中国 GB/T 26572 / 中国 RoHS 2 披露标识无印度尼西亚对应物，印度尼西亚市场不要求；（3）制造商仍应出于环境及 B3 / 电子废弃物原因控制有害物质（见 ledidn-rohs-02 与 ledidn-rohs-03），并核实具体适用 SNI 或任何行业法规是否施加材料限值。不应假定欧盟 RoHS 检测为印度尼西亚所必需或充分；请向 LSPro 及环境主管部门核实实际印度尼西亚要求。
gap.zht: 誠實映射說明：歐盟 RoHS 維度不對應單一印度尼西亞 RoHS 法律。印度尼西亞無橫向 RoHS 式限用物質法規，故中國製造商無法滿足印度尼西亞的 RoHS 義務，因為此類義務本身並不存在。實務影響為：（1）與 LED 產品相關的任何物質限值來自適用 SNI 安全標準及 B3 有害材料規則，而非 RoHS 清單；（2）中國 GB/T 26572 / 中國 RoHS 2 披露標識無印度尼西亞對應物，印度尼西亞市場不要求；（3）製造商仍應出於環境及 B3 / 電子廢棄物原因控制有害物質（見 ledidn-rohs-02 與 ledidn-rohs-03），並核實具體適用 SNI 或任何行業法規是否施加材料限值。不應假定歐盟 RoHS 檢測為印度尼西亞所必需或充分；請向 LSPro 及環境主管部門核實實際印度尼西亞要求。

mandatory_status.target: No horizontal equivalent — Indonesia has no single RoHS-style restricted-substance statute; substance control is via applicable SNI safety requirements and B3 rules
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances

source.publisher: Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan (KLHK) — Ministry of Environment and Forestry, Republic of Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Indonesia has no horizontal RoHS-style restricted-substance law as a market-access gate, so there is no Indonesian RoHS DoC to obtain. Substance control for LED products instead derives from the applicable SNI safety requirements and from B3 hazardous-material and e-waste rules. China's GB/T 26572 / RoHS 2 disclosure label has no Indonesian counterpart. Do not assume EU-style RoHS testing is required or sufficient for Indonesia; verify actual material limits with the LSPro and the environmental authority.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 印度尼西亚无作为市场准入门槛的横向 RoHS 式限用物质法律，故无须取得印度尼西亚 RoHS 符合性声明。LED 产品的物质控制改由适用 SNI 安全要求及 B3 有害材料和电子废弃物规则衍生。中国 GB/T 26572 / RoHS 2 披露标识无印度尼西亚对应物。不应假定欧盟式 RoHS 检测为印度尼西亚所必需或充分；请向 LSPro 及环境主管部门核实实际材料限值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 印度尼西亞無作為市場准入門檻的橫向 RoHS 式限用物質法律，故無須取得印度尼西亞 RoHS 符合性聲明。LED 產品的物質控制改由適用 SNI 安全要求及 B3 有害材料和電子廢棄物規則衍生。中國 GB/T 26572 / RoHS 2 披露標識無印度尼西亞對應物。不應假定歐盟式 RoHS 檢測為印度尼西亞所必需或充分；請向 LSPro 及環境主管部門核實實際材料限值。

requirement_topic.en: B3 Hazardous and Toxic Materials Management (Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun)
requirement_topic.zh: B3 有害有毒材料管理（Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun）
requirement_topic.zht: B3 有害有毒材料管理（Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun）

summary.en: Indonesia regulates hazardous and toxic materials through the B3 (Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun) framework under environmental law, administered by the Ministry of Environment and Forestry (KLHK). The B3 rules govern the import, use, storage, transport, and disposal of listed hazardous substances and may require import notification/registration (and in some cases SNI-pelumas-style or import-licensing controls) for products or components containing certain B3 substances such as mercury. For LED lighting this is most relevant where a product contains mercury (e.g., legacy fluorescent components) or other listed B3 materials. The Minamata Convention on Mercury, to which Indonesia is a party, also drives restrictions on mercury-added products. Mainstream LED lamps are typically mercury-free, but manufacturers must confirm that no component triggers B3 import controls and that any listed substances are handled per the B3 regime.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚通过环境法下的 B3（Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun，有害有毒材料）框架管理有害有毒材料，由环境与林业部（KLHK）管理。B3 规则管辖所列有害物质的进口、使用、储存、运输及处置，并可能对含有某些 B3 物质（如汞）的产品或组件要求进口通报/登记（在某些情况下并设进口许可控制）。对 LED 照明而言，此项在产品含汞（如传统荧光组件）或其他所列 B3 材料时最为相关。印度尼西亚为缔约方的《关于汞的水俣公约》亦推动对含汞添加产品的限制。主流 LED 灯通常无汞，但制造商须确认无任何组件触发 B3 进口控制，并确保任何所列物质按 B3 制度处理。
summary.zht: 印度尼西亞通過環境法下的 B3（Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun，有害有毒材料）框架管理有害有毒材料，由環境與林業部（KLHK）管理。B3 規則管轄所列有害物質的進口、使用、儲存、運輸及處置，並可能對含有某些 B3 物質（如汞）的產品或組件要求進口通報/登記（在某些情況下並設進口許可控制）。對 LED 照明而言，此項在產品含汞（如傳統熒光組件）或其他所列 B3 材料時最為相關。印度尼西亞為締約方的《關於汞的水俁公約》亦推動對含汞添加產品的限制。主流 LED 燈通常無汞，但製造商須確認無任何組件觸發 B3 進口控制，並確保任何所列物質按 B3 制度處理。

standards_or_laws: Government Regulation on the management of hazardous and toxic materials (B3) — Ministry of Environment and Forestry (KLHK)
Minamata Convention on Mercury — mercury-added product restrictions (Indonesia is a party)

summary.en: China controls hazardous substances through GB/T 26572 / China RoHS 2 (restricted-substance limits and disclosure labelling) and, separately, through chemical management instruments such as MEE Order No. 12 (Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances) and GB 30981-class chemical classification/labelling rules. China is also a party to the Minamata Convention and restricts mercury in lighting products. However, China's RoHS-style scheme is product-substance focused (concentration limits + disclosure), whereas Indonesia's B3 framework is a broader environmental import/handling regime rather than a fixed concentration-limit RoHS list.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB/T 26572 / 中国 RoHS 2（限用物质限值及披露标识）控制有害物质，并另行通过化学品管理工具控制，如生态环境部令第 12 号（新化学物质环境管理登记办法）及 GB 30981 类化学品分类/标签规则。中国亦为《水俣公约》缔约方，限制照明产品中的汞。但中国 RoHS 式制度以产品物质为重点（浓度限值 + 披露），而印度尼西亚 B3 框架是更广义的环境进口/处理制度，而非固定浓度限值的 RoHS 清单。
summary.zht: 中國通過 GB/T 26572 / 中國 RoHS 2（限用物質限值及披露標識）控制有害物質，並另行通過化學品管理工具控制，如生態環境部令第 12 號（新化學物質環境管理登記辦法）及 GB 30981 類化學品分類/標籤規則。中國亦為《水俁公約》締約方，限制照明產品中的汞。但中國 RoHS 式制度以產品物質為重點（濃度限值 + 披露），而印度尼西亞 B3 框架是更廣義的環境進口/處理制度，而非固定濃度限值的 RoHS 清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 / China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014) — restricted-substance limits and disclosure label (China)
MEE chemical management instruments — new chemical substance registration and classification/labelling (China)

gap.en: The structural gap is that China uses a concentration-limit RoHS-style scheme while Indonesia uses the broader B3 environmental regime. A Chinese GB/T 26572 compliance file does not map onto Indonesia's B3 requirements. Practical actions for Chinese LED exporters: (1) confirm whether any component (especially mercury in legacy/hybrid products, or other listed B3 substances) triggers B3 import notification/registration or licensing through the importer; (2) ensure mercury-added product restrictions under the Minamata Convention are respected; (3) coordinate B3 compliance with the in-country importer, since import controls and any registration are handled domestically; (4) recognise that B3 is environmental/handling-focused, so factory substance data and safety data sheets may be requested rather than a RoHS concentration declaration. Verify the current B3 list and import procedure with the importer and KLHK.
gap.zh: 结构性差距在于：中国采用浓度限值 RoHS 式制度，而印度尼西亚采用更广义的 B3 环境制度。中国 GB/T 26572 合规文件无法映射至印度尼西亚 B3 要求。中国 LED 出口商的实务行动：（1）确认是否有任何组件（尤其传统/混合产品中的汞，或其他所列 B3 物质）触发 B3 进口通报/登记或许可，须通过进口商办理；（2）确保遵守《水俣公约》下的含汞添加产品限制；（3）与在地进口商协调 B3 合规，因为进口控制及任何登记均在国内办理；（4）认识到 B3 以环境/处理为重点，故可能须提供工厂物质数据及安全数据表，而非 RoHS 浓度声明。请向进口商及 KLHK 核实现行 B3 清单及进口流程。
gap.zht: 結構性差距在於：中國採用濃度限值 RoHS 式制度，而印度尼西亞採用更廣義的 B3 環境制度。中國 GB/T 26572 合規文件無法映射至印度尼西亞 B3 要求。中國 LED 出口商的實務行動：（1）確認是否有任何組件（尤其傳統/混合產品中的汞，或其他所列 B3 物質）觸發 B3 進口通報/登記或許可，須通過進口商辦理；（2）確保遵守《水俁公約》下的含汞添加產品限制；（3）與在地進口商協調 B3 合規，因為進口控制及任何登記均在國內辦理；（4）認識到 B3 以環境/處理為重點，故可能須提供工廠物質數據及安全數據表，而非 RoHS 濃度聲明。請向進口商及 KLHK 核實現行 B3 清單及進口流程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — B3 import notification/registration and handling rules apply to products/components containing listed hazardous substances (e.g., mercury); coordinated via the importer and KLHK
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure + limits) — GB/T 26572 limits and China RoHS 2 disclosure label; Minamata mercury restrictions

source.publisher: Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan (KLHK) — Ministry of Environment and Forestry, Republic of Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Indonesia controls hazardous substances through the broader B3 (Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun) environmental regime rather than a fixed-concentration RoHS list. A Chinese GB/T 26572 file does not satisfy B3. Confirm whether any component (notably mercury, per the Minamata Convention) triggers B3 import notification/registration through the importer, and provide factory substance data / SDS as requested. Verify the current B3 list and import procedure with the importer and KLHK.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 印度尼西亚通过更广义的 B3（Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun）环境制度控制有害物质，而非固定浓度 RoHS 清单。中国 GB/T 26572 文件不能满足 B3。请确认是否有任何组件（尤其依据《水俣公约》的汞）触发 B3 进口通报/登记，须通过进口商办理，并按要求提供工厂物质数据 / 安全数据表。请向进口商及 KLHK 核实现行 B3 清单及进口流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 印度尼西亞通過更廣義的 B3（Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun）環境制度控制有害物質，而非固定濃度 RoHS 清單。中國 GB/T 26572 文件不能滿足 B3。請確認是否有任何組件（尤其依據《水俁公約》的汞）觸發 B3 進口通報/登記，須通過進口商辦理，並按要求提供工廠物質數據 / 安全數據表。請向進口商及 KLHK 核實現行 B3 清單及進口流程。

requirement_topic.zh: 电子废弃物（E-Waste）及报废义务
requirement_topic.zht: 電子廢棄物（E-Waste）及報廢義務

summary.en: End-of-life management of LED lighting in Indonesia is governed primarily through waste-management and B3-waste (limbah B3) rules under environmental law administered by the Ministry of Environment and Forestry (KLHK). Electronic waste that contains hazardous components is treated as B3 waste and is subject to specific collection, transport, storage, and disposal controls. While Indonesia does not yet operate an EU-style producer-responsibility (WEEE) take-back scheme uniformly across all EEE, there are obligations around the proper handling and disposal of hazardous electronic waste, and producer/importer responsibility provisions are developing. There is no formal RoHS-coupled WEEE marking requirement equivalent to the EU crossed-out wheelie-bin symbol mandated nationally for all LED products, but importers should confirm current waste-handling and any extended-producer-responsibility obligations.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚 LED 照明的报废管理主要通过环境法下由环境与林业部（KLHK）管理的废物管理及 B3 废物（limbah B3）规则进行。含有害组件的电子废弃物被视为 B3 废物，须遵守特定的收集、运输、储存及处置控制。尽管印度尼西亚尚未对所有 EEE 统一实施欧盟式生产者责任（WEEE）回收制度，但对有害电子废弃物的妥善处理和处置存在义务，且生产者/进口商责任条款正在发展中。不存在与 RoHS 挂钩、在全国对所有 LED 产品强制要求的、等同于欧盟划叉垃圾桶符号的正式 WEEE 标识要求，但进口商应核实现行废物处理及任何延伸生产者责任义务。
summary.zht: 印度尼西亞 LED 照明的報廢管理主要通過環境法下由環境與林業部（KLHK）管理的廢物管理及 B3 廢物（limbah B3）規則進行。含有害組件的電子廢棄物被視為 B3 廢物，須遵守特定的收集、運輸、儲存及處置控制。儘管印度尼西亞尚未對所有 EEE 統一實施歐盟式生產者責任（WEEE）回收制度，但對有害電子廢棄物的妥善處理和處置存在義務，且生產者/進口商責任條款正在發展中。不存在與 RoHS 掛鈎、在全國對所有 LED 產品強制要求的、等同於歐盟劃叉垃圾桶符號的正式 WEEE 標識要求，但進口商應核實現行廢物處理及任何延伸生產者責任義務。

standards_or_laws: Waste management law and B3 waste (limbah B3) regulations — Ministry of Environment and Forestry (KLHK)
Developing producer/importer responsibility provisions for hazardous electronic waste (Indonesia)

summary.en: China operates the WEEE-style framework through the Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products and the catalogue-based EPR fund (waste electrical and electronic product disposal fund). Producers of catalogue-listed products pay into the fund and qualified dismantlers receive subsidies. Lighting products' inclusion depends on the current catalogue. China also uses an Environmentally Friendly Use Period (EFUP) marking under China RoHS 2. These Chinese take-back/EFUP mechanisms are domestic and do not transfer to Indonesia.
summary.zh: 中国通过《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》及基于目录的 EPR 基金（废弃电器电子产品处理基金）运行 WEEE 式框架。目录所列产品的生产者向基金缴费，合格拆解企业获得补贴。照明产品是否纳入取决于现行目录。中国还在中国 RoHS 2 下使用环保使用期限（EFUP）标识。上述中国回收/EFUP 机制为国内机制，不转移至印度尼西亚。
summary.zht: 中國通過《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》及基於目錄的 EPR 基金（廢棄電器電子產品處理基金）運行 WEEE 式框架。目錄所列產品的生產者向基金繳費，合格拆解企業獲得補貼。照明產品是否納入取決於現行目錄。中國還在中國 RoHS 2 下使用環保使用期限（EFUP）標識。上述中國回收/EFUP 機制為國內機制，不轉移至印度尼西亞。

standards_or_laws: Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (China WEEE / EPR fund)
China RoHS 2 Environmentally Friendly Use Period (EFUP) marking (SJ/T 11364-2014)

gap.en: Neither market's end-of-life scheme is recognised by the other. China's catalogue-based EPR fund and EFUP marking do not satisfy Indonesian obligations, and Indonesia does not (yet) impose an EU-style nationwide WEEE take-back/marking duty on all LED products. The practical gaps for Chinese exporters into Indonesia are: (1) hazardous electronic waste is handled as B3 waste (limbah B3), so any importer-side disposal and the handling of returns/defects must follow KLHK B3-waste rules; (2) the Chinese EFUP mark is not required or recognised in Indonesia; (3) extended-producer-responsibility obligations are developing and may impose future duties on importers/producers — these should be tracked. Confirm with the importer and KLHK whether any take-back, registration, or waste-handling duty currently attaches to the LED product being placed on the Indonesian market.
gap.zh: 两个市场的报废制度互不承认。中国基于目录的 EPR 基金及 EFUP 标识不能满足印度尼西亚义务，而印度尼西亚（尚）未对所有 LED 产品施加欧盟式全国 WEEE 回收/标识义务。中国出口商进入印度尼西亚的实务差距：（1）有害电子废弃物按 B3 废物（limbah B3）处理，故进口方处置及退货/次品处理须遵循 KLHK B3 废物规则；（2）中国 EFUP 标识在印度尼西亚不被要求或承认；（3）延伸生产者责任义务正在发展中，未来可能对进口商/生产者施加义务——应予跟踪。请向进口商及 KLHK 核实投放印度尼西亚市场的 LED 产品当前是否附有任何回收、登记或废物处理义务。
gap.zht: 兩個市場的報廢制度互不承認。中國基於目錄的 EPR 基金及 EFUP 標識不能滿足印度尼西亞義務，而印度尼西亞（尚）未對所有 LED 產品施加歐盟式全國 WEEE 回收/標識義務。中國出口商進入印度尼西亞的實務差距：（1）有害電子廢棄物按 B3 廢物（limbah B3）處理，故進口方處置及退貨/次品處理須遵循 KLHK B3 廢物規則；（2）中國 EFUP 標識在印度尼西亞不被要求或承認；（3）延伸生產者責任義務正在發展中，未來可能對進口商/生產者施加義務——應予跟蹤。請向進口商及 KLHK 核實投放印度尼西亞市場的 LED 產品當前是否附有任何回收、登記或廢物處理義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for hazardous waste handling — hazardous e-waste treated as B3 waste (limbah B3) under KLHK rules; no uniform EU-style WEEE take-back/marking on all LED products yet; EPR provisions developing
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where catalogue-listed — China WEEE/EPR fund contribution for listed products; EFUP marking under China RoHS 2

source.publisher: Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan (KLHK) — Ministry of Environment and Forestry, Republic of Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Indonesia manages LED end-of-life mainly through B3 waste (limbah B3) rules rather than a uniform EU-style WEEE take-back/marking scheme, and producer-responsibility provisions are still developing. China's catalogue-based EPR fund and EFUP marking do not transfer to Indonesia. Coordinate disposal of returns/defects as B3 waste with the importer, do not rely on the Chinese EFUP mark, and track emerging extended-producer-responsibility duties. Confirm current obligations with the importer and KLHK.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 印度尼西亚主要通过 B3 废物（limbah B3）规则管理 LED 报废，而非欧盟式统一 WEEE 回收/标识制度，且生产者责任条款仍在发展中。中国基于目录的 EPR 基金及 EFUP 标识不转移至印度尼西亚。请与进口商按 B3 废物协调退货/次品处置，勿依赖中国 EFUP 标识，并跟踪新兴的延伸生产者责任义务。请向进口商及 KLHK 核实当前义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 印度尼西亞主要通過 B3 廢物（limbah B3）規則管理 LED 報廢，而非歐盟式統一 WEEE 回收/標識制度，且生產者責任條款仍在發展中。中國基於目錄的 EPR 基金及 EFUP 標識不轉移至印度尼西亞。請與進口商按 B3 廢物協調退貨/次品處置，勿依賴中國 EFUP 標識，並跟蹤新興的延伸生產者責任義務。請向進口商及 KLHK 核實當前義務。
